description_long: This is a classic-style scooter with a streamlined, retro body painted in a warm orange color. The scooter features a prominent front fender, rounded side panels, and a black cushioned seat designed for one or two riders. The handlebars are straight with visible hand grips and rearview mirrors, and the front includes a circular headlight. The wheels are medium-sized with metallic rims, and the rear section is slightly bulkier, housing the engine compartment. Chrome accents are visible along the footrest area, and the overall design is reminiscent of vintage Vespa scooters commonly seen in urban environments.
description: A retro orange scooter with a black seat, chrome accents, and a classic rounded body, featuring a front headlight and straight handlebars.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow front fender, headlight, and straight handlebars with grips and mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the scooter, the black seat, chrome footrest, and rounded engine cover.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide back, rear light, and the seat's shape, with the rear wheel partially visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the seat, chrome footrest, and the engine compartment.
attribute_deck_design: medium-length, slightly curved, smooth metal footrest with chrome accent
attribute_brand_logo: small circular logo on the front left panel
